Home › Industries › Auction Software › Lowest Unique Bid › ONLINEALKU Reverse Auction

ONLINEALKU Reverse Auction Multi Seller & Multi Buyer B2B

Industry
Lowest Unique Bid Auction
Client Location
United Kingdom
Project Duration
6 months
Team Size
3 members
Technologies
CodeIgniter MVC framework, our application leverages PHP, MySQL

Project Overview

This is Reverse auction web application. It is use for seller and buyer. Multi seller and Multi buyer. Its a tender types of electronic platform while buying the serice or product. Buyer post what they need to buy and suppliers provide various quotes and competes with each other.

Visit Website

Our Features

1.

Multi Seller

2.

Multi Buyer

3.

Can be use for requesting the quote of any products

4.

Complete analytical report generation

5.

Various chart and diagram to show bid competition

6.

Invites only bids
